content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 aurelian sovereign: Virtual Real Estate Sales Representative (Remote) Anywhere in the World Kentucky Customer Relationship Management, Customer Support, Sales, Customer Service, and Virtual Consultations Design Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4969/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> WY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://aureliansovereign.com/">https://aureliansovereign.com/</a> </p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>Job Summary</strong></h3> <p>We are hiring a <strong>Virtual Sales Representative</strong> to call and convert high-quality, motivated real estate leads. You will be the first point of contact for sellers, build rapport, qualify leads, and guide them through the initial steps of working with us. All leads are <strong>hot and ready to talk</strong> — no cold calling.</p> <p>This is a <strong>remote position</strong> with flexible location but <strong>fixed working hours</strong> (10:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST).</p> <h3><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Call motivated sellers 5 hours per day (remote)</li> <li>Build rapport and have warm, professional conversations</li> <li>Ask qualifying questions about the property and seller’s situation</li> <li>Handle objections using proven sales techniques (training provided)</li> <li>Secure seller’s email once they agree to move forward</li> <li>Work closely with our Transactional Coordinator to get contracts signed</li> <li>Follow up with leads consistently to maximize conversions</li> <li>Maintain accurate records of all conversations</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Fluent English</strong> (must be able to speak clearly and confidently)</li> <li>Strong communication skills and high emotional intelligence (EQ)</li> <li>Confident and persuasive personality</li> <li>Ability to read people and adapt your approach</li> <li><strong>No degree or previous experience required</strong></li> <li>Must be available <strong>10:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST</strong> (Monday to Friday)</li> <li>Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace</li> <li>Self-motivated and disciplined</li> <li>Willing to learn and follow our proven sales system</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What We Offer</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>2 Weeks of Free Training</strong> (paid training period)</li> <li>High-quality, <strong>pre-qualified hot leads</strong> (no cold calling)</li> <li>Full support from our team and Transaction Coordinator</li> <li>Clear sales scripts and objection-handling training</li> <li>Performance bonuses for consistent closers</li> <li>Long-term growth opportunities and additional benefits for high performers</li> <li>Work from anywhere in the world</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Compensation</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>100% Commission-Based</strong></li> <li>You earn when you close deals</li> <li><strong>Expected Earnings</strong>: 5–20+ deals per month (depending on effort and follow-up)</li> <li>Top performers earn very well with consistent effort</li> <li>We provide the best leads — your success depends on your communication and follow-up skills</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideal Candidate</strong></h3> <p>We’re looking for someone who is:</p> <ul> <li>Confident on the phone</li> <li>Great at building trust quickly</li> <li>Coachable and eager to learn</li> <li>Hungry to succeed and grow with the company</li> </ul> <hr> <p><strong>How to Apply?</strong></p> <p>Please send the following to: <strong>frankperezzz@proton.me</strong></p> <ol> <li>Your <strong>resume</strong> (PDF or Word format)</li> <li>A short <strong>voice note</strong> (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself</li> </ol> <p><strong>In your voice note, please include:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Why you’re interested in this role</li> <li>Why you believe you would be a good fit</li> </ul> <p>We review applications on a rolling basis and will contact shortlisted candidates within 48–72 hours.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aurelian-sovereign-virtual-real-estate-sales-representative-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aurelian-sovereign-virtual-real-estate-sales-representative-remote</a></p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.indiewalls.com/">https://www.indiewalls.com/</a> </p> <div class="meSK8 M7eMe"><strong>Role Description</strong></div> <div class="spb5Rd OIC90c"> <p>We are seeking a high-energy, hands-on&nbsp;<strong>Director of Finance</strong> who thrives in the intersection of day-to-day execution and long-term strategy. This is a "player-coach" role: while you will have the support of a bookkeeper, you are expected to be deeply involved in the daily financial operations, system optimization, and data integrity. You aren't just reviewing the books; you are mastering them.</p> <p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Direct Daily Operations:</strong> Lead and help execute all day-to-day accounting functions, including AP/AR, payroll, and general ledger management. You will be the primary driver of the monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Master QuickBooks Online:</strong> Act as the internal expert for <strong>QuickBooks Online</strong>, ensuring all transactions are categorized correctly and the system is utilized to its full potential for accuracy and scalability.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Proactive Cash Flow Management:</strong> Take full ownership of cash flow, aggressively maintaining low A/R levels and ensuring timely collections to fuel business growth.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Systems &amp; Process Engineering:</strong> Evaluate and "roll up your sleeves" to improve financial systems and internal controls, ensuring our proc
